name: haabe-mycelium
description: Mycelium framework — theory-grounded product-thinking discipline for AI agents. Single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: mycelium
plugins.description: 50 skills, 13 theory gates, six diamond scales (Purpose to Market). Evidence-gated discovery-to-delivery harness. Brownfield-safe: install adds skills, agents, hooks; never modifies project root files.
